content:
- Resumed task 12 at TO BE VERIFIED, performed deep skeptical review with broad parallel scans, and rewrote the execution plan to be feasible against existing APIs.
- Replaced TO BE VERIFIED with NOW EXECUTE, then implemented execution directly in src/ha/worker.rs tests: added multi-worker IntegrationFixture wiring real state watch channels across dcs/process/ha, deterministic clocks, scripted DCS watch events, and a scripted process runner/handle.
- Added integration scenarios covering required HA phases/transitions (Replica, CandidateLeader, Primary, FailSafe, Rewinding, Fencing) and end-to-end process feedback assertions via step order dcs->ha->process->ha.
- Hit known stale-target linker error (missing rcgu object) during targeted test run; resolved with cargo clean, reran targeted suite successfully.
- Ran required gates sequentially and green: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint.
- Updated task 12 file to done/passes/passing true and checked all acceptance/plan boxes, ran /bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh, added a new learning to AGENTS.md about explicit multi-worker step ordering, and committed all changes.
- Commit: 5687e34
- Next after quitting: pick up the next .ralph/current_task.txt item and continue loop.

- Created task to replace stringly DCS writes with typed writer API under story-rust-system-harness.
- Task file: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/task-typed-dcs-writes-and-encapsulation.md.
- Next: await user direction or implement task.

- Read startup progress log for Choose-Task (empty output this cycle).
- Parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md and checked explicit <priority> tags across tasks.
- Observed many <passes>false</passes> tasks; no bug tasks have priority tags, while story-rust-system-harness has pending ultra_high chain tasks (13,15) blocked by task 09.
- Applied story-chain + priority rules and selected .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/09-task-api-debug-workers-and-snapshot-contracts.md as the next logical chain-unblocking task.
- Wrote that exact path into .ralph/current_task.txt and stopped immediately.

- Read .ralph/current_task.txt -> .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/09-task-api-debug-workers-and-snapshot-contracts.md.
- Surveyed existing stubs in src/api/* and src/debug_api/* plus worker_contract_tests expectations and system harness plan notes.
- Wrote a detailed execution plan into .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/09-task-api-debug-workers-and-snapshot-contracts.md and appended TO BE VERIFIED as requested.
- Plan proposes: typed serde API models + validation, switchover writes only to /{scope}/switchover via DcsStore, minimal HTTP transport in api worker using httparse (to keep step_once meaningful), debug snapshot worker publishing SystemSnapshot via watch channel, BDD integration tests + Makefile update.
- Next: perform deep skeptical verification pass (must change at least one thing) and then replace TO BE VERIFIED with NOW EXECUTE before implementing.
